CE1.justification: Acted directly with no clarifying questions and did not require the user to load any document.

CE2.justification: Single-sentence reply naming the three routings with no preamble, restatement, or trailing summary.

CE3.justification: Said where each piece went (observations / followups / daybook) but did not name in-band why observations.md over decisions.md — the rationale lives only in private notes.

CE4.justification: Three independent appends/creates that each stand alone; an interruption would leave no orphans or ambiguous in-progress artifacts.
